name: Pasta Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Med Unpeeled Red Delicious Apple, Diced
1 3/4 cups Small Shell Pasta, Cooked and drained
11 oz Mandarin Oranges In Juice, Well Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, toss apple with lemon juice.
2. Stir in mayonnaise, skim milk, sugar, and salt until blended.
3. Gently stir in pasta, celery, and mandarin oranges until well coated.
4. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
5. Garnish with celery leaves if desired.
Makes 6 - 8 servings
